es.title: Noticias Diarias: Copyright e Inteligencia Artificial
es.subtitle: Lo último en leyes de derechos de autor para músicos, compositores y productores.

sections.title: La Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos se pronuncia sobre el caso de derechos de autor de AI
sections.content: En una decisión reciente, la Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos ha establecido que las obras creadas con la ayuda de inteligencia artificial no son elegibles para la protección de derechos de autor. Esta decisión ha generado un gran impacto en la industria musical, ya que muchos artistas y productores han comenzado a utilizar la IA para crear música.

sections.title: La empresa de música Amper Music lanza una plataforma de licencias para obras de AI
sections.content: La empresa de música Amper Music ha lanzado una plataforma de licencias para obras de inteligencia artificial, lo que permite a los productores y compositores obtener permisos para utilizar obras de AI en sus proyectos. Esta plataforma es una de las primeras en ofrecer licencias para obras de AI y ha generado un gran interés en la industria musical.

sections.title: Guía del día: Cómo registrar tus obras de AI
sections.content: Para registrar tus obras de AI, es importante que sigas los siguientes pasos: primero, asegúrate de que tu obra sea original y no infrinja los derechos de autor de otros. Luego, debes determinar si tu obra es elegible para la protección de derechos de autor. Finalmente, debes registrar tu obra en la oficina de derechos de autor correspondiente. Es importante que consultes con un abogado especializado en derechos de autor para asegurarte de que estás siguiendo los procedimientos correctos.

en.title: Daily News: Copyright & Artificial Intelligence
en.subtitle: The latest in copyright law for musicians, composers, and producers.

sections.title: US Supreme Court Rules on AI Copyright Case
sections.content: In a recent decision, the US Supreme Court has ruled that works created with the help of artificial intelligence are not eligible for copyright protection. This decision has had a significant impact on the music industry, as many artists and producers have begun to use AI to create music. Companies such as Spotify and Apple Music are closely watching the developments in this area.

sections.title: Amper Music Launches AI Music Licensing Platform
sections.content: Music company Amper Music has launched a licensing platform for AI-generated music, allowing producers and composers to obtain permission to use AI-generated works in their projects. This platform is one of the first to offer licenses for AI-generated music and has generated significant interest in the music industry. The platform is expected to simplify the process of obtaining licenses for AI-generated music and provide more opportunities for artists and producers to work with AI-generated content.

sections.title: Today's Guide: Registering Your AI-Generated Works
sections.content: To register your AI-generated works, follow these steps: first, ensure that your work is original and does not infringe on the copyrights of others. Next, determine if your work is eligible for copyright protection. Finally, register your work with the relevant copyright office. It is essential to consult with a copyright attorney to ensure you are following the correct procedures. Additionally, consider registering your work with a platform such as the US Copyright Office's online registration system to streamline the process.
